title: EGMS slope monitoring on an Alpine motorway
summary: EGMS revealed previously unmonitored slow-moving slope sectors on a mountain motorway, enabling proactive remediation.
challenge: A motorway through unstable geology had a history of slope failures but only six point sensors across a 28 km corridor, leaving most of it unmonitored.
approach: EGMS ascending and descending displacement series were combined to decompose 2D ground motion across the full corridor, revealing several previously unmonitored sectors with persistent downslope movement.
results: Geotechnical investigation confirmed active failure surfaces at most flagged sectors. Containment structures were installed proactively, with large estimated avoided costs based on a comparable past failure.
